jd_text: Strategic Head of Security Operations (SOC) | Premier Multi-Sector Enterprise The Opportunity: Orchestrate Resilience at Scale Are you a Cybersecurity visionary who thrives at the intersection of deep technical architecture and executive-level strategy ? We are seeking a sophisticated Security Operations Leader to transform and manage an advanced Security Operations Centre (SOC) for a prestigious, multi-sector group in the Middle East. This is not a "maintenance" role. We are looking for a leader capable of building and transforming security frameworks across complex, multi-industry environments—from critical infrastructure to advanced digital platforms. The Persona: Who You Are We are seeking a candidate who mirrors the professional excellence of industry veterans—someone who possesses: Executive Presence: You can translate complex threat landscapes into operational KPIs and strategic risk-based recommendations for Board-level stakeholders. The Architect’s Mindset: You don't just manage SIEMs; you have a proven track record of implementing Zero Trust Network Architectures (ZTNA) and building SOC functions from the ground up. Technically Proficient & Hands-on: Deep experience with SIEM platforms (Azure Sentinel/Splunk) and a thorough understanding of OT & IT security operations. Elite Communicator: You possess the rare ability to mentor a team of high-performing analysts while maintaining strong relationships with regulatory bodies and global vendors. The Mission: Your Impact Strategic Evolution: Collaborate with the CISO to refresh and evolve a Group-wide Security Strategy that safeguards diverse business domains. SOC Transformation: Lead the end-to-end management of the SOC, overseeing threat monitoring, incident response (containment to recovery), and continuous vulnerability management. Sophisticated Architecture: Support the Zero Trust (ZTNA) strategy across the enterprise. Continuous Validation: Integrate DevSecOps and automated testing frameworks to ensure the organization remains resilient against emerging AI-driven threats. Global Compliance: Align SOC capabilities with international frameworks including GDPR, PCI-DSS, and regional requirements. Your Professional Toolkit Experience: 12–15+ years of progressive Cybersecurity experience, with at least 6+ years in a senior leadership or SOC managerial role. Proven Track Record: Experience managing multi-million dollar security portfolios and leading cross-functional teams (IT, OT, and Network Ops). Education: Master’s degree in Information Technology or Cybersecurity; an MBA in Finance or Strategy is highly preferred. Credentials: CISSP and CISM are essential. Specialized certifications like GCFA Experience with intrusion detection/prevention systems and advanced security technologies
